title: Pharmacy Technician
description: Johns Hopkins Medicine is seeking a Pharmacy Technician for our New York clinical facility. You'll prepare medications, manage inventory, and support pharmacists in providing comprehensive patient care. This hybrid role is part of a world-renowned academic medical center committed to excellence in patient care and research.
responsibilities: Prepare medications under pharmacist supervision; verify calculations and dosages
Manage pharmacy inventory, ordering, and stock rotation
Process prescription orders and maintain accurate patient medication records
Assist patients with medication education and answer questions
Maintain pharmacy cleanliness and comply with safety standards

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; pharmacy technician certification preferred
skills: Proficiency with pharmacy software and dispensing systems
Strong organizational and attention to detail
Excellent customer service and patient interaction skills
Understanding of pharmaceutical terminology and medications
Ability to work in a fast-paced healthcare environment

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Paid time off and paid holidays
